# sessionContentURLs

**Instance Property**

An array of URLs that each point to a directory containing captured content.

## Declaration

```swift
final var sessionContentURLs: [URL] { get }
```

## Discussion

Content in the URLs is captured during a capture extension’s [doc://com.apple.LockedCameraCapture/documentation/LockedCameraCapture/LockedCameraCaptureSession]. These directories are located within the capture extension’s containing app’s data container.
title: sessionContentURLs
